retry_reason: The operation is a no-op when remain_skb is NULL; there is no failure to retry.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases the reference on the remaining RX SKB stored in hif_dev->remain_skb, then sets the pointer to NULL and resets the rx_remain_len field. It also increments the drop statistics counter. The function acquires the rx_lock internally for protection. After calling this function, the caller must not access hif_dev->remain_skb or rely on hif_dev->rx_remain_len without appropriate synchronization. This wrapper is typically invoked during error recovery or cleanup to discard an incomplete SKB.
